## Meeting Purpose

[Align on strategy reset for HeyGen and prepare for client presentation](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team aims to present a comprehensive plan to achieve HeyGen's ambitious 10x growth target](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Focus on high-impact ideas: content clusters, translations, programmatic opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Need to balance short-term wins with sustainable long-term growth strategy](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Presentation to include realistic timeline, effort/impact assessment, and resource requirements](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)

## Topics

### Current Performance and Client Expectations

  - [HeyGen has set an ambitious 10x growth target, likely driven by investor/market pressures](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Recent domain authority growth (+7 in past year) is significant, but 10x still challenging](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Client mentioned desire for link building, though team sees limited potential impact](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)

### Content Strategy Ideas

  - [Update publish dates across older content to boost performance](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Focus on successful content clusters and scale those topics](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Leverage HeyGen's product features (e.g. video translation) in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Explore editorial opportunities around roadmap-related keywords (\~6,000 monthly searches)](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Conduct competitor gap analysis to identify high-potential topic areas](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)

### Translation and International Expansion

  - [Significant opportunity, but complex to implement (took ClickUp \~1 year with dedicated engineering)](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Could be a major differentiator and growth driver if executed well](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Need to address potential client concerns about translation quality](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)

### Programmatic Content Opportunities

  - [Identify 2,500-3,000 programmatic content opportunities from competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [Create forward-facing content calendar to visualize growth trajectory](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=2027.0)
  - [Balance volume with quality to avoid potential penalties](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)

### Presentation Strategy

  - [Frame ideas into "big bets" with timelines and impact/effort assessments](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
  - [Create visualization of 6-12 month engagement with expected traffic growth curve](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=2037.0)
  - [Prepare two scenarios: achievable growth with current SOW vs. resources needed for 10x](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Address unrealistic expectations while demonstrating path to significant growth](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)

### Client Management

  - [Reschedule presentation from Wednesday to Friday to ensure high-quality delivery](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [Consider upselling to higher engagement level to support ambitious growth targets](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
  - [Be prepared to challenge unrealistic expectations while showing commitment to goals](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=1970.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dave to coordinate Friday meeting time with Nav and Daniel](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=2699.0)
  - [Team to have internal check-in on Wednesday to review presentation draft](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=2710.0)
  - [Mariana and Dave to collaborate on PSEO and editorial content plan](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=2055.0)
  - [Prepare visualizations of growth scenarios and resource requirements](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=2044.0)
  - [Include Kirkland and Matthew in follow-up discussions on technical implementation](https://fathom.video/share/rozZgQKurfVo86jehXxBbvzECHdc6_jf?tab=summary&timestamp=2789.0)
